families.description: Mirai is one of the first significant botnets targeting exposed networking devices running Linux. Found in August 2016 by MalwareMustDie, its name means "future" in Japanese. Nowadays it targets a wide range of networked
Flagged as malicious by multiple AV engines (see vendor verdicts below) but not yet attributed to a tracked malware family.
